Package org.areslib.command

Class SubsystemBase

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.command.SubsystemBase
All Implemented Interfaces:
Subsystem
Direct Known Subclasses:
AresOperatorInterface, AresVisionSubsystem, DifferentialDriveSubsystem, MecanumDriveSubsystem, RobotHealthTracker, SimpleIntakeSubsystem, SwerveDriveSubsystem
public abstract class SubsystemBase extends Object implements Subsystem
A base for subsystems that provides a more intuitive class hierarchy.

Important: Subsystems must be explicitly registered with the CommandScheduler via CommandScheduler.getInstance().registerSubsystem(this). This is typically done in the RobotContainer after construction.

  • Constructor Details

    • SubsystemBase

      public SubsystemBase()
      Default constructor. Does NOT auto-register with the scheduler. Call CommandScheduler.getInstance().registerSubsystem(this) in your RobotContainer.
